member.name: T:FSBS.Infrastructure.Availability.AvailabilityCache
member.summary: Redis-backed implementation of . Cache keys follow the pattern: availability:{simulatorId}:{fromTicks}:{toTicks} A wildcard scan on availability:{simulatorId}:* is used for invalidation so all date-range variants are evicted together. TTL is 60 seconds as required by the spec.

member.name: M:FSBS.Infrastructure.Availability.AvailabilityCache.#ctor(StackExchange.Redis.IConnectionMultiplexer)
member.summary: Redis-backed implementation of . Cache keys follow the pattern: availability:{simulatorId}:{fromTicks}:{toTicks} A wildcard scan on availability:{simulatorId}:* is used for invalidation so all date-range variants are evicted together. TTL is 60 seconds as required by the spec.

member.name: T:FSBS.Infrastructure.Cognito.CognitoService
member.summary: AWS Cognito implementation of . Catches Cognito-specific exceptions and re-throws domain exceptions so that the Application layer and the API exception handler remain decoupled from the AWS SDK.

member.name: M:FSBS.Infrastructure.Cognito.CognitoService.#ctor(Amazon.CognitoIdentityProvider.IAmazonCognitoIdentityProvider,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{FSBS.Infrastructure.Cognito.CognitoSettings})
member.summary: AWS Cognito implementation of . Catches Cognito-specific exceptions and re-throws domain exceptions so that the Application layer and the API exception handler remain decoupled from the AWS SDK.

member.name: T:FSBS.Infrastructure.Cognito.CognitoSettings
member.summary: Bound from appsettings.json section "Cognito". In deployed environments the values are injected as environment variables by the CDK AppStack from Secrets Manager / SSM Parameter Store.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Cognito.CognitoSettings.Region
member.summary: AWS region the Cognito pools are deployed in (e.g. eu-west-1).

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Cognito.CognitoSettings.CustomerPoolClientId
member.summary: App client ID for the customer pool (fsbs-customer-pool). This is the client used for self-registration and sign-in flows. Must be a public client (no client secret) when called from the API.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Cognito.CognitoSettings.CustomerPoolId
member.summary: User Pool ID for the customer pool. Used for admin operations that require the pool ID rather than the client ID.

member.name: T:FSBS.Infrastructure.Cognito.StubCognitoService
member.summary: No-op used when DevAuth:Enabled is true. All methods succeed silently so the registration flow can be exercised locally without an AWS Cognito pool. The dev seed endpoint (POST /dev/users/seed) replaces the Post-Confirmation Lambda for creating the database record.

member.name: T:FSBS.Infrastructure.Messaging.SqsPublisher
member.summary: Amazon SQS implementation of . Serialises the message as JSON and includes the CLR type name as a message attribute so the notification worker can dispatch without deserialising the body first.

member.name: M:FSBS.Infrastructure.Messaging.SqsPublisher.#ctor(Amazon.SQS.IAmazonSQS,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{FSBS.Infrastructure.Messaging.SqsSettings})
member.summary: Amazon SQS implementation of . Serialises the message as JSON and includes the CLR type name as a message attribute so the notification worker can dispatch without deserialising the body first.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Messaging.SqsSettings.BookingEventsQueueUrl
member.summary: URL of the SQS queue that receives booking domain events.

member.name: T:FSBS.Infrastructure.Storage.S3Service
member.summary: Amazon S3 implementation of . Only generates pre-signed URLs — the documents bucket is never served through CloudFront directly.

member.name: M:FSBS.Infrastructure.Storage.S3Service.#ctor(Amazon.S3.IAmazonS3,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{FSBS.Infrastructure.Storage.S3Settings})
member.summary: Amazon S3 implementation of . Only generates pre-signed URLs — the documents bucket is never served through CloudFront directly.

member.name: P:FSBS.Infrastructure.Storage.S3Settings.DocumentsBucketName
member.summary: Name of the private documents bucket (pre-signed URLs only).
